title: Tone training APIs: URL crawl + paste samples (timeouts, limits, failures)

task.description: Add /api/tone/train-url and /api/tone/train-paste to create a tone_profile once per user. URL flow fetches HTML w/ timeout and text extraction; paste flow enforces max length and handles server errors.
acceptance_criteria: POST train-url with empty url returns 400; UI shows required validation and no profile is created.
URL crawl success creates tone_profiles row for user and status API returns trained=true after refresh.
URL crawl unreachable/non-HTML returns 422 with message; UI shows failure + retry + paste fallback CTA.
URL crawl exceeding TIMEOUT_MS returns 408; UI shows timeout error and retry option.
Paste flow blocks >MAX_SAMPLE_CHARS client-side and server returns 413 if exceeded; empty paste returns 400; failures do not create profile.

definition_of_done: Timeout implemented via AbortController and constant
Text extraction handles basic HTML and strips scripts/styles
API enforces one tone_profile per user (409 on duplicate)
All errors mapped to clear UI messages
ui_requirements: Train URL + Paste pages use Card with Textarea (paste) and Input (url). Show LoadingState during submit, disable Button. On error show ErrorState banner and keep fallback CTA visible. Completed: Badge + Button to /generate.
